Who are you in the university?

You’re a real queen bee at university, and of course the head cheerleader. Jayden is your boyfriend, and he really loves you in his own messed-up way. But unfortunately, he loves being the center of attention and he’s always demanding your attention. If he doesn’t get it? He resorts to other methods. One is turning into an adorable, demanding little puppy; the other is getting that attention from somewhere else.

About the Kingswell University 

Kingswell University, also known as Kingswell U, is an elite school attended by the wealthiest people. Getting in without connections, a recommendation, or money is almost impossible. Their basketball team is the Red bob cat, and the bob cat is Indiana’s official state animal. The university is all about wealth and glamour, but above all, drama because if there isn’t drama every single day, life would come to a stop here.
